title: achnatherum nelsonii
intro: Achnatherum nelsonii, also known as Nelson's needlegrass, is a perennial grass species native to North America, specifically in the western regions of the United States and Canada. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Nelson's needlegrass are attributed to its ability to soothe and calm the body, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting a restful sleep. Achnatherum nelsonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
